theme.en: AI Demand Reprices the Semiconductor Stack
theme.zh: AI需求重估整条半导体链

dek.en: AI infrastructure demand is reaching beyond accelerators into CPU racks, memory pricing, foundry competition, and local supply-chain investment. At the same time, the dispute over whether an ASML EUV system reached China shows how export controls increasingly shape the equipment market.
dek.zh: AI基础设施需求正从加速器外溢至CPU机架、存储定价、晶圆代工竞争和本地供应链投资。与此同时，围绕ASML EUV设备是否进入中国的争议表明，出口管制正日益重塑设备市场。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Deloitte Sees AI Infrastructure Recasting the Chip Cycle
title.zh: Deloitte称AI基础设施正在重塑芯片周期

summary.en: Deloitte's 2026 semiconductor outlook says AI infrastructure investment is becoming a primary industry demand driver, reducing the sector's historical dependence on consumer-electronics cycles. The shift matters because capacity, product roadmaps, and capital allocation increasingly follow datacenter workloads rather than unit growth in PCs and phones.
summary.zh: Deloitte的2026年半导体行业展望认为，AI基础设施投资正成为主要需求驱动力，降低行业对消费电子周期的传统依赖。其影响在于，产能、产品路线图和资本配置正越来越多地围绕数据中心工作负载，而非PC和手机的销量增长展开。

title.en: Agentic AI Pulls Dense CPU Racks into the Buildout
title.zh: 智能体AI将高密度CPU机架纳入扩建潮

summary.en: ServeTheHome outlines a dense agentic-AI CPU rack that can be assembled today with shipping AMD and Dell hardware. The design highlights demand on both sides of agent deployment: CPUs run orchestration and agent services while also absorbing the legacy workloads those agents call.
summary.zh: ServeTheHome介绍了一套可用现有AMD和Dell硬件搭建的高密度智能体AI CPU机架。该方案凸显智能体部署对两端算力的需求：CPU既运行编排与智能体服务，也承载这些智能体调用的传统工作负载。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: Reported Apple-Intel Alliance Raises Foundry Stakes
title.zh: 据报Apple与Intel结盟推高晶圆代工竞争

summary.en: KED Global reports that an Apple-Intel alliance is set to intensify the foundry contest with Samsung and TSMC. Even without disclosed process or volume details, a closer tie to Apple would give Intel a consequential reference customer as it tries to establish an external foundry business.
summary.zh: KED Global报道称，Apple与Intel的联盟将加剧其与Samsung和TSMC之间的晶圆代工竞争。尽管报道未披露制程或订单规模，更紧密的Apple关系仍可为Intel建立外部代工业务提供一个分量显著的标杆客户。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: AMD Reportedly Plans Another 10–15% RX 9000 Price Increase
title.zh: 据报AMD计划将RX 9000再提价10%至15%

summary.en: AMD is reportedly preparing another 10–15% increase for Radeon RX 9000 graphics cards as DRAM costs continue to lift component prices. The report remains unconfirmed, but it shows how memory tightness can move through the bill of materials and reach buyers even when GPU silicon itself is unchanged.
summary.zh: 据报道，由于DRAM成本持续推高零部件价格，AMD正准备将Radeon RX 9000显卡再提价10%至15%。该消息尚未获得证实，但它显示出存储供给紧张如何沿物料成本传导，即使GPU芯片本身未变，也会最终影响终端买家。

title.en: SK hynix Shows CXL 3.2 Modules with Its AI-Server Memory Stack
title.zh: SK hynix展示CXL 3.2模块及AI服务器存储全栈

summary.en: SK hynix displayed its broader AI-server memory portfolio at HPE Discover, including CXL 3.2 modules. The emphasis beyond HBM matters because capacity expansion, pooling, and tiering over CXL are becoming part of the same system-level memory bottleneck as accelerator bandwidth.
summary.zh: SK hynix在HPE Discover展示了更完整的AI服务器存储产品组合，其中包括CXL 3.2模块。关注点不再局限于HBM，这一点很重要：通过CXL进行容量扩展、池化和分层，正与加速器带宽一起成为同一个系统级存储瓶颈。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: Texas Grants $3.9 Million for Xycarb's Georgetown Expansion
title.zh: Texas拨款390万美元支持Xycarb扩建Georgetown工厂

summary.en: Texas awarded Xycarb a $3.9 million semiconductor grant to expand its operation in Georgetown. The award is modest beside fab incentives, but it targets the supplier layer that determines whether new domestic manufacturing capacity has a nearby materials and components base.
summary.zh: Texas向Xycarb提供390万美元半导体补助，用于扩建其Georgetown业务。与晶圆厂补贴相比金额不大，但它指向决定新增本土制造产能能否获得就近材料与零部件支持的供应商层。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: Canada Links Defense Policy to Domestic Chip Capacity
title.zh: Canada将国防政策与本土芯片能力挂钩

summary.en: Canada is using defense and technology policy to signal stronger support for homegrown semiconductor capabilities. Connecting chips to procurement and national security could create steadier demand than stand-alone innovation programs, although the report does not specify new production targets.
summary.zh: Canada正通过国防与科技政策释放加强本土半导体能力的信号。把芯片与政府采购和国家安全挂钩，可能比单独的创新计划形成更稳定的需求，不过报道并未给出新的产量目标。

title.en: ASML Rejects US Claim That an EUV System Reached China
title.zh: ASML否认美国关于EUV设备进入中国的说法

summary.en: ASML denied a US government report suggesting that one of its EUV lithography systems had been shipped to China, calling the claim inaccurate. The disagreement is material because EUV tools sit at the center of advanced-node export controls, and any verified transfer would expose a serious enforcement gap.
summary.zh: ASML否认美国政府有关其一套EUV光刻系统已运往中国的说法，并称该消息不准确。这一分歧影响重大，因为EUV设备处于先进制程出口管制的核心；若相关转移得到证实，将暴露出严重的执法缺口。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
title.zh: 新势力与新硅

title.en: Tensordyne Bets on Logarithmic Arithmetic against Nvidia
title.zh: Tensordyne押注对数运算挑战Nvidia

summary.en: Tensordyne is pursuing an accelerator architecture that converts multiplication-heavy workloads into additions in the logarithmic domain. The approach attacks the cost of arithmetic itself rather than scaling a conventional tensor-core design, but its commercial value will depend on accuracy, software support, and performance on real models.
summary.zh: Tensordyne正在开发一种加速器架构，把乘法密集型工作负载转换为对数域中的加法。该路线不是继续扩展传统tensor core，而是直接降低算术运算成本；但其商业价值仍取决于精度、软件支持以及真实模型上的性能。

theme.zh: 工作负载重画硬件边界

dek.en: This week's papers move system assumptions into hardware: memory-clock state enters edge governors, privacy and temporal safety gain architectural support, and specialized accelerators reshape arithmetic and dataflow. The strongest results pair those ideas with measured FPGA, 16nm silicon, ferroelectric devices, or deployed accelerator data.
dek.zh: 本周论文把更多系统假设下沉到硬件：边缘调度器纳入存储时钟状态，隐私与时间内存安全获得架构支持，专用加速器则重塑算术与数据流。较强的结果还给出了FPGA、16nm芯片、铁电器件或已部署加速器的测量数据。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Two-Dimensional Semiconductors for Post-Silicon Electronics
title.zh: 面向后硅时代电子学的二维半导体

papers.authors: Yanglin Long, Haozhe Wang, Gangning Lou, et al.

summary.en: This review connects 2D-semiconductor device work to integrated-circuit requirements, organizing progress around contact resistance, gate-dielectric integration, and dimensional scaling. It also tracks the transition from planar devices to FinFET, GAA, and CFET structures alongside memory and RF demonstrations. The paper is a useful device-to-circuit map, but it is a review rather than new measured silicon and does not resolve the manufacturability gap.
summary.zh: 这篇综述把二维半导体器件研究与集成电路需求连接起来，围绕接触电阻、栅介质集成和尺寸缩放梳理进展。文章还追踪了从平面器件到FinFET、全环绕栅极(GAA)和CFET结构的演进，并覆盖存储与RF演示。它提供了一张有用的器件到电路路线图，但属于综述，并未给出新的实测芯片，也没有解决可制造性缺口。

title.en: Proton-Radiation Hardening of High-Speed Ge/Si Photodetectors
title.zh: 高速Ge/Si集成光电探测器的质子辐射加固

papers.authors: Junguo Xu, Yingying Zhong, Xiongping Bao, et al.

summary.en: The work tests high-speed Ge/Si integrated photodetectors under a dose-calibrated broad-spectrum proton beam and evaluates hydrogen loading as a hardening treatment. Untreated devices lose bandwidth and accumulate dark current, while hydrogen-loaded devices retain more bandwidth and limit leakage growth. The measured-device result offers a practical path for space photonics, although long-duration orbital validation is still needed.
summary.zh: 该研究在经过剂量标定的宽能谱质子束下测试高速Ge/Si集成光电探测器，并评估氢加载作为辐射加固手段。未经处理的器件出现带宽下降和暗电流累积，而氢加载器件保留了更多带宽并抑制漏电增长。实测器件结果为航天光子学提供了一条可行路径，但仍需长期在轨环境验证。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: CHERI-D Adds Inline Object IDs for Temporal Memory Safety
title.zh: CHERI-D以内联对象ID增强时间内存安全

papers.authors: Yuecheng Wang, Jonathan Woodruff, Alfredo Mazzinghi, et al.

summary.en: CHERI-D attaches object-ID metadata to capability pointers and stores IDs inline with allocation data to strengthen temporal memory safety. Simulation and hardware evaluation show lower revocation overhead than Cornucopia Reloaded while enabling strict use-after-free mitigation rather than only use-after-reallocation protection. The architecture is promising, but deployment still depends on compiler, operating-system, and allocator integration across the CHERI stack.
summary.zh: CHERI-D把对象ID元数据附加到能力指针，并将ID内联存放在分配数据中，以增强时间内存安全。仿真和硬件评估显示，它相较Cornucopia Reloaded降低了撤销开销，并可实现严格的释放后使用防护，而不只是重新分配后使用防护。该架构具有潜力，但部署仍取决于CHERI软件栈中编译器、操作系统和内存分配器的协同集成。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: ExSpike Exploits Irregular Sparsity with Full-Event Execution
title.zh: ExSpike以全事件执行利用不规则稀疏性

summary.en: ExSpike keeps every SNN layer in spike form, adds adjacent-position event compression, and includes an attention core for spike-driven self-attention. An AMD Xilinx Virtex-7 FPGA implementation is evaluated on classification and segmentation workloads, showing that irregular event sparsity can be converted into practical execution savings. The evidence is FPGA-based, so ASIC area and energy results remain open.
summary.zh: ExSpike让SNN各层始终保持脉冲形式，引入相邻位置事件压缩，并加入用于脉冲驱动自注意力的attention core。研究在AMD Xilinx Virtex-7 FPGA上针对分类和分割负载进行评估，表明不规则事件稀疏性可以转化为实际执行收益。现有证据基于FPGA，ASIC面积与能耗结果仍待验证。

title.en: Ferroelectric Compute-in-Memory Runs Neural Dynamical Systems
title.zh: 铁电存内计算运行神经动力系统

papers.authors: Keshava Katti, Adithya Selvakumar, Pratik Chaudhari, et al.

summary.en: FerroNDS maps continuous-time neural dynamics onto multi-bit ferrodiode compute-in-memory using analog integrator and oscillator primitives. A 128-neuron system forecasts 500 ms ahead at sub-watt power, reporting 0.29–1.64 μJ per neuron per inference and a 25–40× area reduction versus SRAM-based digital systems. The end-to-end ferrodiode integration is notable, but array scaling, process variation, and manufacturability are not yet established.
summary.zh: FerroNDS利用模拟积分器和振荡器原语，把连续时间神经动力系统映射到多比特铁电二极管存内计算硬件。其128神经元系统可在亚瓦功耗下预测未来500 ms，报告每神经元每次推理0.29至1.64 μJ能耗，并较基于SRAM的数字系统缩小25至40倍面积。端到端铁电二极管集成值得关注，但阵列扩展、工艺波动和可制造性尚未得到验证。

title.en: AIA Uses a 16nm RISC-V Mesh for Approximate Inference
title.zh: AIA以16nm RISC-V网格加速近似推理

papers.authors: Shirui Zhao, Nimish Shah, Wannes Meert, et al.

summary.en: AIA combines a RISC-V host with a 2D mesh of 16 customized RISC-V cores for sampling-based approximate inference. The 16nm SoC reaches 1,277 MSample/s at 0.9 V and 20 GSamples/s/W at 0.7 V by using non-normalized Knuth-Yao sampling and direct inter-core register access. Reported gains reach 2× performance and 1.45× energy efficiency over the prior system, though the comparison is specialized to probabilistic-model workloads.
summary.zh: AIA将RISC-V主机与由16个定制RISC-V核心组成的二维网格结合，用于基于采样的近似推理。这颗16nm SoC通过非归一化Knuth-Yao采样和核心间寄存器直接访问，在0.9 V下达到1,277 MSample/s，在0.7 V下达到20 GSamples/s/W。相较前代系统，其报告性能提升最高2倍、能效提升1.45倍，但比较范围集中于概率模型负载。

title.en: Five TPU Generations Favor Architectural Stability at Scale
title.zh: 五代TPU以架构稳定性支撑规模扩展

papers.authors: Norman P. Jouppi, Sridhar Lakshmanamurthy, Cliff Young, et al.

summary.en: Google's retrospective from TPU v2 through Ironwood reports 10× growth in HBM capacity and bandwidth per node, 100× higher peak node performance, and 3,600× higher supercomputer performance over eight years. The paper argues that a stable core architecture, optical circuit switching, self-test, and hardware replay absorbed major workload changes without repeated redesign. It is a useful first-party systems history, but not an independent cross-platform benchmark.
summary.zh: Google对TPU v2至Ironwood的回顾显示，八年间单节点HBM容量和带宽提高10倍，节点峰值性能提高100倍，超级计算机性能提高3,600倍。论文认为，稳定的核心架构、光路交换、自测试和硬件重放，使系统能够吸收重大工作负载变化而无需反复重构。它是一份有价值的第一方系统史料，但并非独立的跨平台基准测试。

title.en: AI Research & Systems
title.zh: AI研究与系统

title.en: Edge-Inference Governors Need Memory-Clock State
title.zh: 边缘推理调度器需要感知存储时钟状态

summary.en: Measurements on Jetson Orin NX show that CPU/GPU-only latency models miss the memory-clock state that determines whether edge inference meets a deadline. Under tight deadlines, an EMC-blind model misses 25–28% of cycles, while an EMC-aware governor cuts misses to at most 1.3% under a 2% QoS budget; median latency shifts by as much as about 45% across two Orin SKUs. The result spans CNN, ViT, and LLM decode workloads, making memory-clock observability a deployment requirement rather than a tuning detail.
summary.zh: Jetson Orin NX上的测量表明，只考虑CPU与GPU频率的延迟模型遗漏了决定边缘推理能否按时完成的存储时钟状态。在严格截止时间下，不感知EMC的模型有25%至28%的周期违约，而EMC感知调度器可在2%的QoS违约预算下把违约率降至最高1.3%；在两款Orin SKU上，中位延迟变化最高约45%。结果覆盖CNN、ViT和LLM解码负载，说明存储时钟可观测性是部署要求，而非简单调优项。

title.en: LLM Accelerator Rankings Change between Prefill and Decode
title.zh: LLM加速器排名随Prefill与Decode阶段变化

papers.authors: Shun Usami, Venkatram Vishwanath, E. Wes Bethel

summary.en: A phase-aware Llama2-7B evaluation finds GPUs consistently stronger in compute-heavy Prefill, while GroqRack delivers lower time per output token in Decode when batching is unavailable. GPUs regain the Decode-throughput advantage as batch size increases, showing that a single tokens-per-second number can invert platform conclusions. The scope is limited to one model and current batching support, so the results should guide methodology more than establish a permanent hardware ranking.
summary.zh: 一项面向Llama2-7B的分阶段评估发现，GPU在计算密集的Prefill阶段持续占优，而在不支持批处理时，GroqRack在Decode阶段实现更低的单输出token时间。随着batch size增加，GPU重新取得Decode吞吐优势，说明单一tokens-per-second指标可能会反转平台结论。研究仅覆盖一个模型和当前批处理能力，因此更适合作为评测方法指导，而非固定的硬件排名。

title.en: EDA & Design Automation
title.zh: EDA与设计自动化

title.en: Knowledge-Augmented LLM Agent Shifts HLS Verification Left
title.zh: 知识增强LLM智能体将HLS验证前移

papers.authors: Zhihan Xiao, Hongbing Lang, Zhe Zhao, et al.

summary.en: The framework checks consistency between original C and HLS-oriented C before synthesis using an LLM agent backed by an HLS verification knowledge graph. It combines static structural checks, dynamic behavioral equivalence, symbolic execution, and coverage-driven test refinement to constrain unreliable generated testbenches. The design is broader than prompt-only RTL generation, but it remains a preprint and its value depends on coverage and runtime at industrial HLS scale.
summary.zh: 该框架在综合前检查原始C与面向HLS的C之间的一致性，LLM智能体由HLS验证知识图谱提供支持。它结合静态结构检查、动态行为等价、符号执行和覆盖率驱动的测试细化，以约束生成测试平台的不可靠性。其设计比单纯依靠提示词生成RTL更完整，但目前仍是预印本，工业级HLS规模下的覆盖率和运行成本将决定实际价值。
